misc_summary: This file contains legitimate miscellaneous content including: front cover, advertisements for Mitchell's Beauty Shoppe, The Deseret News Press, various clothing and garment suppliers, Utah Power & Light Co., typewriter company, laundry services, and other businesses; table of contents for Vol. 19 No. 5; publisher information and subscription details; and masthead information. The two poems listed above appear only as titles in the table of contents without their full text being present in this misc file.
